nodes.name: 判断电池序列号是否误录入sn
查询电池序列号是否和sn重复绑定

parameters.query:
select * FROM mes.machine_data
WHERE data ->>'battery_id'!='{{ $json.battery_id }}' and data ->>'sn' = '{{ $json.sn }}' and
procedure_detail_id ='{{ $json.procedureDetailId }}'
and retroid_id='{{ $('查询相关信息').first().json.retroid_id }}'
order by createtime DESC
limit 1

select * from mes.retroid r
where r.retroid='{{ $json.battery_id }}'

nodes.name: 判断电池序列号是否和sn重复绑定

parameters.query:
select * from mes.retroid r
where r.retroid = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}' and r.status in('1','2')

select md.procedure_detail_id  from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id 
from mes.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name in('SN与电池二维码绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and md.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
order by md.createtime desc 
limit 1

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name ='SN与电池二维码绑定';

SELECT md.procedure_detail_id
FROM mes.machine_data md
JOIN mes.retroid r ON md.retroid_id::text = r.retroid_id::text
WHERE md.procedure_detail_id IN (
  SELECT pd.procedure_detail_id
  FROM mes.procedure_detail pd
  WHERE pd.procedure_name IN ('SN与电池二维码绑定', '物料解除绑定')
)
AND md.retroid_id::text = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
ORDER BY md.createtime DESC
LIMIT 1

nodes.name: 判断是否解绑，判断条件相等(false)为绑定

parameters.query:
select md.retroid_id, md.data -->'battery_id' as battery_id 
from mes.machine_data md 
where md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}' and md.procedure_detail_id ='{{ $json.procedure_detail_id }}'
order by md.createtime desc 
limit 1

select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd  
where pd.procedure_name ='SN与电池二维码绑定';

nodes.name: 查SN与电池二维码绑定的序列id

conditions.rightValue: ={{ $('查询电池序列号是否和sn重复绑定').item.json.retroid_id }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: 1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口

nodes.name: 将结果内空格、换行去除
报错信息：查询不到对应工序

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.previousProcedure.procedure_detail_id }}
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroidId }}'
order by md.createtime DESC
limit 1

nodes.name: 查询上一道工序是否完成
报错信息：该SN未完成上一道工序

parameters.query:
WITH latest_history AS (
    -- 已选择最新的记录并展开数组
    SELECT json_array_elements_text(procedure_detail_id->'procedure_detail_id')::int AS detail_id
    FROM mes.history_procedure_list
    WHERE history_procedure_list_id = (
        -- 获取最新记录的 id
        SELECT history_procedure_list_id
        FROM mes.history_procedure_list
        WHERE history_procedure_list_id = '{{ $json.history_procedure_list_id }}' 
        ORDER BY createtime DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
)
-- 使用 DISTINCT ON 获取每个 detail_id 的最新记录
SELECT DISTINCT ON (hpd.procedure_detail_id) hpd.*
FROM mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
WHERE hpd.procedure_detail_id IN (
    SELECT detail_id FROM latest_history
)
AND hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2
ORDER BY hpd.procedure_detail_id, hpd.createtime DESC;

SELECT 
       r.retroid_id,
       jo.joborder_number,
       jo.joborder_id,
       pm.product_model_name,
       pi.product_code,
       jo.procedure_list_id,
       jo.history_procedure_list_id
FROM mes.retroid r
JOIN mes.retroid_generate rg ON r.retroid_generate_id = rg.retroid_generate_id
JOIN mes.joborder jo ON rg.joborder_id = jo.joborder_id
JOIN mes.product_info pi ON jo.product_id = pi.product_id
JOIN mes.product_model pm ON pi.product_model_id = pm.product_model_id
WHERE r.retroid = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}'
and r.status in('1','2');  -- 替换成你要查询的 retroid

parameters.jsCode: return $('查询电池序列号是否和sn重复绑定').all();

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in({{ $json.procedure_detail_id }},62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->>'bind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' or md.data ->'data_old'->>'unbind_id'='{{ $json.data.bind_id }}' is not null)
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1
